settings.code:
GENERAL CONTACTS

Customer Care:

Email: care@poshandpepper.com
Toll-free: +1 (855) 519-2454
Chat: start a conversation now

Having a world-class shopping experience is our benchmark. We’re committed to our P&PPP Promise all year round, however during busy periods like holidays, sales, and special campaigns you might experience higher waiting times from our Customer Care team. Your deliveries may take longer than usual to get to you but never worry — you’ll receive a confirmation email as soon as it’s shipped. Need more information? Visit our Customer Care.

Press:

Email: press@poshandpepper.com

If you are a journalist, a blogger, or a content creator, and looking for press releases, information, or premium imagery for editorial purposes, please e-mail your requests to press@poshandpepper.com. Are you looking for samples, or piece gifting for a collab? Then maybe consider subscribing to our Affiliate Value Program.

Retail Partners:

Email: onboarding@poshandpepper.com

An emerging designer, an independent brand, or a retailer, and interested in joining our marketplace? Please check out our Designer Value Program, or apply directly here. If you have other retail-related inquires, Please e-mail retail@poshandpepper.com with details including a website address if you have one.

Affiliates:

Email: partners@poshandpepper.com

Are you an influencer interested in our Ambassador Value Program? Apply here.
Are you interested in joining the P&PPP Affiliate Value Program? If you have an inquiry related to our affiliate scheme, please e-mail us at partners@poshandpepper.com and include the name and URL of your website.

Careers:

If you are interested in a career at POSH&PEPPER, please visit our careers page.
